author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented triu, tril (triangular masking with diagonal offset), diag (extract/construct diagonal), diagflat (flatten then diag), roll (circular shift along dim), cdist (pairwise Lp distance matrix for 2D/3D). All CPU-only with CUDA guards. 10 tests. stft/istft skipped (complex windowed FFT — needs separate design). Exported from ferrotorch-core.
